BaseField.Name: Label43
BaseField.Text: Instructions: This section is only visible to VaultAccess users. Check Administrator Override to remove read-only configurations and show all fields. Select Admin Save to save any changes without applying business rules. Remember to uncheck override and save before closing.

FormScriptItem.Name: FormValidation_1
FormValidation
FillinAndRelate_0
FormValidation_0
FillinAndRelate_1
FillinAndRelate
Subscription_Pack_Name_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Subscription Pack Name")

FormScriptItem.Name: btn_Add_Item_onClick
Start_Date_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Start Date")

FormScriptItem.Name: btnTabFourTwo_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: alert('This is another active tab button.');

FormScriptItem.Name: btnClose1_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Global.CloseAndUnlockForm();

FormScriptItem.Name: btnDeactivate_onClick
btnClose2_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Global.CloseAndUnlockForm('Yes');

FormScriptItem.Name: btnReload_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.ReloadRepeatingRowControl('RRCPackItems')

FormScriptItem.Name: End_Date_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("End Date")

FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Type")

FormScriptItem.Name: btnTabFourOne_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: alert('This is an active tab button.');
